name: Bogeys & Brews Golf
address: 11694 Bent Grass Mkt Vw Suite 140, Falcon, CO 80925
about: Bogeys & Brews Golf is an indoor golf simulator venue in Falcon, Colorado. It features multiple simulator bays available for hourly rental, offering year-round golf regardless of weather. The venue combines golf with a full-service bar and lounge atmosphere, catering to both individual golfers and groups. It provides options for leagues, tournaments, lessons, and event hosting, making it a versatile space for social golf and practice.
why_golfers_like_it: Cutting-edge simulator technology with pro-grade tracking and immersive visuals
Year-round golf availability with no weather delays or tee times
A relaxed, upscale atmosphere perfect for socializing between rounds

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen available with food service in the lounge
Full bar service with craft beers and cocktails available

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own golf clubs to use in the simulator bays.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted as Bogeys & Brews offers a full kitchen and bar service.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: For a full 18-hole round, the venue recommends allowing 1 hour per person.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Bogeys & Brews is family-friendly and suitable for golfers of all levels, including juniors.
